headline: Q1 2026 Telecom Wars: Analyst Eye 30% Gains in T-Mobile Post-Earnings
summary: Telecom giants reported solid results in Q1 2026. Analysts are particularly bullish on T-Mobile going forward, projecting over 30% upside.

headline: Barclays Flags Growth Targets and Execution Focus for Verizon (VZ)
summary: Verizon Communications Inc. (NYSE:VZ) ranks among the best low-risk investments in May 2026. On March 31, Barclays analysts stated that Verizon Communications Inc. (NYSE:VZ) is facing higher performance demands due to recent competitor moves and stock resets, with Q1 results serving as a crucial indicator of strategic implementation.
